title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Single Fitted Sheet 25cm Deep | Black Polycotton Bed Sheet | Soft & Breathable Easy Care Bedding with Elastic Corners | Single Mattress Bottom Sheet - (90 x 190 cm)
features: PRODUCT DIMENSIONS - 1 x Single Fitted Sheet measuring (90 x 190 cm) with a 25 cm (10 inch) depth, designed to perfectly fit a single mattress.
PREMIUM MATERIAL COMPOSITION - Made from a durable 50% Cotton & 50% Polyester blend, this single bed sheets combines softness, comfort, and long-lasting strength.
SECURE ELASTIC CORNERS - The strong elastic all around ensures the fitted sheet single bed stays in place, providing a snug fit and effortless bed-making.
SUPER SOFT & SMOOTH - Crafted with tightly woven, high-density fine yarns for a luxuriously soft, smooth, and breathable finish - premium quality bedding & linen for everyday comfort.
EASY CARE INSTRUCTIONS - Machine washable at 40℃. Wash dark coloured bedsheets separately. Do not bleach. Tumble dry on low to maintain long-lasting freshness of your bedsheets.
description: Product Description DIAMOND PLAIN FITTED SHEET ★ A simple way to give your bedroom a completely new look is with our plain dyed diamond collection bed sheets. ★ Outstanding quality for a sumptuous living. A step towards luxury and delicacy with your desired softness, Smooth, comfortable, and highly durable. ★ It comes in a choice of colours that can be used on their own or mixed and matched with bed linen, allowing you to change your room to suit your mood. ★ Extra luxury: Fabric retains its natural softness to give you an extra luxury. Cool and dry. Draws moisture away from the skin to help balance body temperature. ★ Material Composition: Polycotton 50% Cotton, 50% Polyester ★ Available Sizes: Single: 91cm x 193cm 4FT Small Double: 190 x 122 x 30cm Double: 137cm x 193cm King: 152cm x 203cm Super King: 182cm x 203cm ★ Includes: 1x Fitted Sheet ★ Care Instructions: Machine Washable at 40 °C. Do not Dry clean. Do not bleach. Tumble dry at low temperature. Iron at low temperature. Steam ironing may be a risk. ★ Brand: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA@ Note: All photographs are for illustration purposes only. Actual colours may slightly vary from the pictures. Safety Warning Steam ironing may be a risk. Box Contains 1 Fitted Sheet See more
